source_name: Department for Transport Road Traffic Statistics API
geography_base: Traffic count points and associated annual traffic statistics
notes: DfT road traffic API is now live in the app for an advanced sampled traffic-flow context measure based on London count points and link lengths.

geography_base: Publication-specific; often school, ward, or local authority
notes: Useful only where geography is resident-meaningful or at least ward/local-authority benchmark level; school-only outputs should stay out of the core neighbourhood explorer.
Environment Agency flood-area polygons are now live in the app as a contextual neighbourhood flood-overlap share, with careful caveats.
Ranks and deciles are treated as non-additive display summaries.

Strong thematic fit for air-quality context, but station-based data is usually better as benchmark or contextual evidence than as a direct neighbourhood estimate; probe endpoint currently returning 503.

current_app_usage: Live neighbourhood housing and fuel-poverty indicators
notes: London Datastore is now live in the app for LSOA-backed housing-quality, housing-market, and fuel-poverty context indicators, while ward-only, borough-only, duplicate, and non-LSOA spatial datasets remain catalogued only.

source_name: NHS England Patients Registered at a GP Practice
geography_base: LSOA 2021 quarterly outputs plus GP practice / ICB levels
notes: Strong neighbourhood-health context source because official LSOA 2021 files can be downloaded and aggregated directly; key caveat is registered population is not the same as resident population.

source_name: NHS England Quality and Outcomes Framework
refresh_mode: Refresh local QOF files and rebuild QOF LSOA allocations
api_or_download: Published CSV download + NHS GP registration support files
geography_base: GP practice source data allocated to LSOA 2021 via practice-to-LSOA registrations
current_app_usage: Live neighbourhood QOF prevalence with grouped advanced condition drill-down indicators and annual trend views where history exists
notes: The app uses supplied QOF raw files for 2021/22 to 2024/25 plus year-matched GP practice registration support files and Census-based age structure to derive neighbourhood-estimated LSOA indicators across all supported measure families.

typical_periodicity: Overnight / daily for core organisation updates
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Phase 2.
Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Phase 2.

geography_base: National transport access nodes and gazetteer localities
notes: NaPTAN access-node API is now live in the app for neighbourhood transport-access counts and density.

typical_periodicity: Dataset-specific; Census 2021 tables are stable, labour market datasets refresh on their own schedules
current_app_usage: Live in app for selected LSOA Census indicators, including population, housing, skills, work, ethnicity and health measures via repeatable Nomis API fetches
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Core. Now live for selected LSOA Census indicators at LSOA level; MSOA indicators remain excluded from the public app.

typical_periodicity: Varies by profile and indicator release cycle
current_app_usage: Metadata discovery and future catalogue only
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Selective.

typical_periodicity: Dataset-specific, often monthly to annual depending on series
current_app_usage: Candidate benchmark/context source; not live at runtime
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Selective.
Current app uses local Census extracts processed to neighbourhood level.

typical_periodicity: Geography-release dependent; updates when official boundary and lookup products refresh
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Infrastructure.
Useful for housing-energy context, but the live API is protected and raw certificate records need careful aggregation before public display.

geography_base: Point features, corridor features, and network metadata
notes: TfL BikePoint API is now live in the app for cycle-hire station counts, densities, and dock-capacity context measures.

current_app_usage: Repeatable route behind current downloaded crime data
notes: Neighbourhood suitability in source discovery: Core.
Current app uses downloaded monthly London street-crime files and recomputes neighbourhood rates.
